cases.prompt: Set up Laravel Horizon with auto-scaling supervisors for production
cases.expect: references balance=auto + autoScalingStrategy + per-environment maxProcesses from references/supervisors-and-configuration.md

cases.prompt: Why do my Horizon workers keep using old code after deploy?
cases.expect: references horizon:terminate on deploy + Supervisor restart from references/operations-and-monitoring.md

cases.prompt: Configure Slack alerts when Horizon jobs wait too long
